steps.title: Substitute the number of managers
steps.content: The function $f(x)=7x+1$ gives the total number of people when there are $x$ managers. For $7$ managers, use $x=7$.

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.content: $$f(7)=7(7)+1=49+1=50.$$ The total number of people on the retreat is 50.

steps.title: Check the context
steps.content: The answer is a count of people, not a number of managers. The input is $7$ managers, and the output is $50$ total people.
